dsl_rule.translation_notes: Deliberation candlestick pattern with bidirectional breakouts. Entry conditions use prev_high/prev_low to detect breakouts above/below the prior candle formation. Exit conditions trigger on trend reversal (close crossing back through entry level). Hold period set to 9 days (midpoint of 7-11 day range cited in source). Pattern is context-dependent: upward breakouts in existing uptrends, downward breakouts initiating new trends. Success rates and volume metrics marked AUTHOR_SILENT were not translatable to specific conditions.

source_rule_text: Deliberation candlestick pattern: A robust candle pattern with directional breakouts (upward or downward) from a candle formation
